steps.title: Rearrange to standard form
steps.content: Move all terms to one side: $$-4x^2 - 7x + 36 = 0$$

steps.title: Backsolve to find the positive solution
steps.content:
Backsolving — testing choice B (9/4): Substitute $x = \frac{9}{4}$ into the equation.
$$-4\left(\frac{9}{4}\right)^2 - 7\left(\frac{9}{4}\right) + 36$$
$$= -4 \cdot \frac{81}{16} - \frac{63}{4} + 36$$
$$= -\frac{81}{4} - \frac{63}{4} + 36$$
$$= -\frac{144}{4} + 36 = -36 + 36 = 0$$

This works, and $\frac{9}{4} > 0$ is positive, so that matches choice B — B is correct.
